items.text: Hi Priya, Thanks for volunteering as a campus tour guide. Your first shift is Saturday, October 4, at 9:30 AM outside Lambert Hall. Please pick up your $5 guide badge from the Welcome Center beforehand. Wear comfortable shoes. Best, Ms. Donovan

questions.stem: According to the email, what must Priya obtain before her shift?

options.A: A printed map of the campus route
options.B: A confirmation slip from Ms. Donovan

questions.explanation: The email tells Priya to pick up her $5 guide badge from the Welcome Center beforehand, which is a five-dollar identification badge.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the nature of the volunteer shift?

options.A: It will be conducted entirely indoors
options.C: It will be canceled if it rains
options.D: It involves a fair amount of walking

questions.explanation: Because the email advises wearing comfortable shoes and meeting outside Lambert Hall, the shift involves a fair amount of walking.

items.text: Dear Jamal, Your resume review with Career Services is confirmed for Wednesday, March 11, at 2:00 PM in Hutchins Hall, Room 305. Please email a current draft to Mr. Reyes at least one day in advance so he can prepare. Thanks, Career Services

questions.stem: According to the email, what is Jamal asked to do before the meeting?

options.A: Reschedule the appointment with Mr. Reyes
options.B: Print several copies of his resume
options.C: Send a current draft in advance

questions.explanation: The email asks Jamal to email a current draft to Mr. Reyes at least one day in advance.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about Mr. Reyes's role in the appointment?

options.A: He will assign Jamal to a job opening
options.B: He will review the draft beforehand
options.C: He will lead a group resume workshop
options.D: He will grade the resume for a course

questions.explanation: Since Jamal must send the draft a day early so Mr. Reyes can prepare, it can be inferred he will review the draft beforehand.

items.text: Notice: Due to road repairs on Elm Street, the campus shuttle will follow a detour from Monday, June 8, through Friday, June 12. Temporary stops will be added at Pearson Library and the Science Quad. Service to the Elm Street stop is suspended during this period.

questions.stem: According to the notice, where will temporary shuttle stops be added?

options.A: At the main bus terminal downtown
options.B: At Pearson Library and the Science Quad
options.C: At the Elm Street parking structure
options.D: At the student health center entrance

questions.explanation: The notice states that temporary stops will be added at Pearson Library and the Science Quad.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about riders who normally use the Elm Street stop?

options.A: They will pay an extra detour fare
options.B: They must walk to the downtown terminal
options.C: They will need an alternate stop that week
options.D: They should drive their own vehicles instead

questions.explanation: Because service to the Elm Street stop is suspended during the detour, those riders will need an alternate stop that week.

items.text: Notice: The recycling bins outside Talbot Hall will be relocated to the loading dock on Friday, February 13. A $20 deposit is required to borrow a sorting cart from the Facilities Office. Bins must not be moved by students. Direct questions to Facilities at extension 4471.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what is required to borrow a sorting cart?

options.B: A written request to Talbot Hall staff

questions.explanation: The notice states that a $20 deposit is required to borrow a sorting cart from the Facilities Office.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about how students should handle the bins?

options.A: They should leave the relocation to staff
options.B: They may move the bins after February 13
options.C: They can request bins for personal use
options.D: They must sort recyclables before pickup

questions.explanation: Because the notice states bins must not be moved by students, it can be inferred that students should leave the relocation to staff.
